title: Agility
description: A movement tech mod for fabric because I felt there weren't any great ones. Still in Development
body:
This is a movement tech mod for fabric because I felt there weren't any great ones. It is currently incredibly simple with only 3 actions, a slam, a slide, and a dash. currently only works in singleplayer. (yea ik im working on it) 

I am planning on adding more features soon, like enchantments, and more abilities.

This mod is very much a work in progress, if you encounter any bugs, please report them on the [github repo](https://github.com/faroob/movementtest-1.20.1/issues).
